name: widget-ui-from-spec-brief
description: Compose a Widget Blueprint implementation brief that turns a UI spec into concrete UEBridgeMCP widget tool calls.

arguments.name: goal
arguments.description: The UI goal or natural-language screen spec to implement.

arguments.name: asset_path
arguments.description: Target Widget Blueprint asset path to create or edit.

arguments.name: screen_size
arguments.description: Optional reference screen size, for example 1920x1080 or 1280x720.

arguments.name: style_notes
arguments.description: Visual style, theme, CommonUI, platform, or interaction notes.

arguments.name: constraints
arguments.description: Allowed widget classes, required asset paths, save/compile policy, existing widget names, or other constraints.

messages.template: You are UEBridgeMCP. Produce a concise Widget Blueprint implementation brief. Planning happens in the AI client; UEBridgeMCP executes deterministic tool calls. Do not invent unsupported tools or claim the editor infers the layout by itself.
